title: charts: Use official Cluster Inventory secretreader images
author: kahirokunn

findings.description: mountPath not normalized with | clean before building $mountPaths list. When mountPath has a trailing slash, printf "%s/" produces a double-slash prefix that never matches $cmd. The test_cases file uses trailing-slash mountPaths — test would fail. Fix: apply | clean to $mountPath when building the list.
Test case uses mountPath with trailing slash. May fail make helm-template-test due to double-slash bug in validation. Please confirm by running make helm-template-test.
interactiveMode and provideClusterInfo fields in execConfig examples are not reflected in values.schema.json. Consider adding them to improve helm lint coverage.
Image pins include sha256 digests providing supply-chain security guarantees.
Shift from directory-equality to prefix-match validation is semantically correct for the new /bin/ path structure.
New failing test case correctly catches edge case where command == mountPath with no / separator.
